title: Sunrise Harvest
body:
# Sunrise Harvest
Sunrise Harvest is a mod that intends to change the way players farm crops in minecraft.
Instead of growing randomly over time, crops now grow up by one stage every morning.

Morning is considered the time that all players wake up from their beds.

## Mod Compat
Currently, Sunrise Harvest is compatible with the following mods:
- Farmer's Delight
